metadata.name: Energy Sector - Environmental Compliance
metadata.description: Comprehensive Knowledge Graph for environmental compliance in oil & gas operations
metadata.regulatory_framework: Clean Air Act, Clean Water Act, 40 CFR Parts 60-65

rules.subject: Facility SO₂ discharge
rules.reasoning: Regulation explicitly limits sulfur dioxide emissions to 100 ppm maximum

rules.subject: SO₂ emissions monitoring
rules.reasoning: Continuous emission monitoring required with measurements every 15 minutes

rules.subject: Nitrogen oxide (NOₓ) emissions
rules.reasoning: NOₓ emissions limited to 75 ppm during facility operation (6 AM to 10 PM)

rules.subject: Particulate matter (PM) emissions
rules.reasoning: Particulate emissions limited to 50 mg/m³ average over 30-day period

rules.subject: VOC emissions
rules.reasoning: Volatile organic compound emissions capped at 25 kg per day

rules.subject: Wastewater discharge pH
rules.reasoning: Water quality standard requires pH between 6.0 and 8.5 for aquatic life protection

rules.subject: Wastewater temperature
rules.reasoning: Thermal pollution limits require discharge temperature below 38°C

rules.subject: Mercury concentration in discharge
rules.reasoning: Toxic pollutant limit for mercury in wastewater discharge

rules.subject: Lead concentration in discharge
rules.reasoning: Toxic pollutant limit for lead in wastewater discharge

rules.subject: Oil and grease in discharge
rules.reasoning: Federal prohibition on oil/grease discharge exceeding 15 mg/L monthly average

rules.subject: Monthly compliance report
rules.reasoning: Quarterly reports required by 15th of month following reporting period

rules.subject: Violation of emissions limits
rules.reasoning: Any deviation or exceedance must be reported within 24 hours of discovery

rules.subject: Equipment failure
rules.reasoning: Monitoring equipment failure must be reported within 1 hour

rules.subject: Annual certification
rules.reasoning: Annual certification of compliance must be signed by responsible official

rules.subject: Monitoring equipment calibration
rules.reasoning: Continuous emission monitoring systems must be calibrated at least monthly

rules.subject: Preventive maintenance
rules.reasoning: Emission control equipment requires preventive maintenance at minimum quarterly

rules.subject: Data retention
rules.reasoning: All monitoring data and records must be retained for minimum 5 years

rules.subject: Emergency response plan
rules.reasoning: Risk management plan must be reviewed and updated annually at minimum

rules.subject: Staff training
rules.reasoning: Personnel must receive annual training on safety and environmental procedures

rules.subject: Acid mist emissions
rules.reasoning: Acid mist emissions limited to 5 mg/m³ measured over 1-hour average

precedence_rules.explanation: NOₓ limits apply during operating hours; SO₂ limits are 24/7
pH and temperature are independent water quality parameters
